title: Agent Encryption Key
description: X25519 public key for HPKE encryption. Used for TMPX exposure token encryption with HPKE mode_base.

kid.description: Key identifier. Opaque — MUST NOT encode geographic or deployment information.

kty.description: JWK key type. Must be OKP for X25519.

crv.description: Curve name. Must be X25519 for TMPX encryption.

use.description: JWK use value. Must be enc for encryption keys.
